default_policy.allowed_font_type: commercially usable open-source original fonts only

font_roles.name: Noto Sans SC
font_roles.fallback_stack: "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei UI", "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", system-ui, sans-serif
font_roles.usage: Readable Simplified Chinese body text, UI labels, captions, website navigation, information-heavy PPT pages.
restrictions: Use Google Fonts CSS API as the primary source when publishing web pages.
Use the original font family name.
Only add commercially usable open-source original fonts to this registry.

font_roles.name: Noto Serif SC
font_roles.usage: Simplified Chinese classical titles, editorial guofeng headlines, poetry-forward covers, cultural PPT section openers.
restrictions: Use Google Fonts CSS API as the primary source when publishing web pages.
Use the original font family name.
Only add commercially usable open-source original fonts to this registry.

font_roles.name: Noto Sans TC
font_roles.fallback_stack: "Source Han Sans TC", "Microsoft JhengHei UI", "Microsoft JhengHei", "PingFang TC", system-ui, sans-serif
font_roles.usage: Readable Traditional Chinese body text, UI labels, captions, website navigation, information-heavy PPT pages.
restrictions: Use Google Fonts CSS API as the primary source when publishing web pages.
Use the original font family name.
Only add commercially usable open-source original fonts to this registry.

font_roles.name: Noto Serif TC
font_roles.usage: Traditional Chinese classical titles, editorial guofeng headlines, poetry-forward covers, cultural PPT section openers.
restrictions: Use Google Fonts CSS API as the primary source when publishing web pages.
Use the original font family name.
Only add commercially usable open-source original fonts to this registry.

font_roles.name: Noto Sans Mono
font_roles.usage: Latin digits, catalogue IDs, dates, code-like labels, and compact technical metadata.
restrictions: This is not a CJK font.
Do not use for Chinese body text, table explanations, travel descriptions, menu descriptions, or cultural notes.
Use Noto Sans SC/TC or system Chinese fonts for Chinese text.

font_roles.name: 朝华标题明朝体A
font_roles.license: Free commercial use, per author release; see source evidence
font_roles.author: 特里王
font_roles.redistribution_note: Not bundled in this repository. Web delivery uses the ITBXM R2 result.css generated with a cn-font-split style pipeline.
font_roles.fallback_stack: "Noto Serif SC", "Source Han Serif SC", "Songti SC", "SimSun", serif
font_roles.usage: Heavy decorative Simplified Chinese display titles, covers, chapter openers, poster headlines, and brand hero text.
restrictions: Use for short decorative text only.
Do not use for long body text, menus, route descriptions, course paragraphs, or dense captions.
Load through the registered result.css link; do not hand-write @font-face or WOFF2 URLs.
Keep Noto/system serif fallback after this family.

font_roles.name: 京华老宋体MN
local_family_aliases: 京華老宋体-MN折中印刷字形
font_roles.license: Free commercial use, per author release; see source evidence
font_roles.author: 特里王
font_roles.redistribution_note: Not bundled in this repository. Web delivery uses the ITBXM R2 result.css generated with a cn-font-split style pipeline.
font_roles.fallback_stack: "Noto Serif SC", "Source Han Serif SC", "Songti SC", "SimSun", serif
font_roles.usage: Light decorative Simplified Chinese serif for poems, title slips, exhibit labels, signatures, and short cultural headings.
restrictions: Use for short decorative text only.
Do not use for long body text, menus, route descriptions, course paragraphs, or dense captions.
Load through the registered result.css link; do not hand-write @font-face or WOFF2 URLs.
Keep Noto/system serif fallback after this family.
